title: ManifoldPayload
description: Cross-language contract for ManifoldPayload<D>. The Rust struct is defined at kernel/epsilon/epsilon/crates/epsilon/src/manifold.rs:264 and is the unit of context teleportation. The Python reference implementation in kernel/epsilon/epsilon_core must serialize to and deserialize from this shape.

dim.description: The const generic D from the Rust type. Receivers must reject payloads whose dim does not match their compiled monomorphisation.

point_count.description: Number of valid entries in `points`. Must be <= MAX_PAYLOAD_POINTS (compiled into the receiver).

items.description: An EpsilonPoint<D>: a length-`dim` array of f64 coordinates.

points.description: The first `point_count` entries are valid; the rest may be padded zeros.

signature_b0.description: Betti number β₀ — number of connected components.

signature_b1.description: Betti number β₁ — number of 1-dimensional holes.

signature_b2.description: Betti number β₂. For a well-sampled S² point cloud this equals 1. Must satisfy the Euler-characteristic relation 2 − β₀ + β₁ within the receiver's tolerance.

liveness_anchor.description: Inherited liveness score from source agent (used by the Chebyshev guard).
